title: Fluorescence Imaging of Interscapular Brown Adipose Tissue in Living Mice.
author: Rice DR White AG Leevy WM Smith BD
content: S-EPMC4442081 PMC4442081 Fluorescence Imaging of Interscapular Brown Adipose Tissue in Living Mice. Brown adipose tissue (BAT) plays a key role in energy expenditure and heat generation and is a promising target for diagnosing and treating obesity, diabetes and related metabolism disorders. While
